Home / Services / 24/7 Storm Response

24/7 Storm Response

Rapid response to storm-damaged trees threatening homes or power lines.

When summer thunderstorms or winter ice storms hit Charlotte, our team is ready with chainsaws and cranes. We prioritize hazards threatening structures - like dangling limbs over Dilworth rooftops or downed trees blocking South End streets.

Our Duke Energy-approved crews safely handle trees entangled with power lines. We document damage for insurance claims with detailed photos and arborist reports. For historic districts like Wesley Heights, we salvage viable wood for community projects. After major weather events, we coordinate with city forestry to clear public rights-of-way while respecting protected tree ordinances.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Safety assessment and hazard prioritization
  2. 02 Step 2: Utility line identification and coordination
  3. 03 Step 3: Strategic removal to minimize further property damage
  4. 04 Step 4: Debris management per local regulations

Benefits

  • Prevents secondary damage from falling debris
  • Restores access to driveways and roads quickly
  • Provides proper documentation for insurance needs
  • Protects undamaged portions of valuable trees

Frequently Asked Questions

What should I do if a tree falls on my house?

Call us immediately for temporary stabilization - we’ll tarp damaged areas and secure hazardous limbs until permanent repairs can be made, crucial during Charlotte’s active storm seasons.

Do you work with my insurance company?

Yes, we provide detailed arborist reports and damage documentation that meets insurer requirements - particularly helpful for extensive claims after major weather events.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with 24/7 storm response? Contact us today.
